title: Endocraft SMP Player Pack
description: Player-Pack made for both the Endocraft SMP and Creative server's.
body:
## Endocraft SMP Vanilla+ This modpack focuses on making Quality of Life changes (QOL) and improving the game’s overall experience. With this modpack, users can get more out of their playtime experience while maintaining the vanilla integrity players have come to love and expect. **Additions** Using fabric, many optimization mods and QOL mods have been added. this includes mods for game optimization, shaders, and functionalities like Freecam and Litematica. some other additions include: - Mini-Map/World Map - Simple Voice Chat - Shaders - Inventory Management Mods - Enhanced Block Entities - Status - And many more! **Optimization** With the help of the Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor mods, users can expect an Optifine-like performance increase. Learn more Here. **Why should I Download?** 1 reason is for the package of mods already gathered for you! The bigger reason is that for the members of the Endocraft SMP, this pack serves as a way for all users to enjoy some of the mods we use without needing the technical knowledge needed to install them for themselves. All bug fixing can be done by myself, all the player needs to do is hit update/install and then play! **Updates** The plan with this pack is to make it an ongoing pack as times change. As soon as there is a version change, once the mods also update, we plan to update this pack to keep it going. In the example of version 1.0.0, the first number represents a Minecraft version change; the second number represents changes in mods (adding or removing), and the third represents a minor update of mods. **Credit** Shaders Pack Used: Complimentary Reimagined
Link: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined
